basic_details.job_title: NKGSB Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Branch Managers, Head IBD and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NKGSB Cooperative Bank (NKGSB Bank) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Various Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 08-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Upto 40 yrs for Branch Managers, Upto 50 yrs for Head IBD.
age_limit.details: Branch Managers: Upto 40 years. Head IBD: Upto 50 years (relaxable in special cases).

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline, CAIIB/JAIIB, Degree/Diploma in Trade Finance, LLB.
qualification.details: Branch Managers: Graduate in any discipline, CAIIB/JAIIB preferred. Minimum 5 years to 7 years of branch banking experience in officer of Assistant Manager cadre, with branch leadership exposure. Head IBD: Graduate in any discipline + Degree/Diploma in Trade Finance; CAIIB preferred. 15 years of banking experience in Executive cadre. Asst. General Manager / Dy. General Manager - Operations: Graduate with relevant specialised banking experience. An experienced professional, to manage customer grievances, ensure regulatory compliance, and act as the primary liaison between the organization, the regulator (RBI), and the customer and responsible for resolving customer complaints. Will have Operations Dept., Clearing Dept., RTGS/Demat, Grievance Redressal Unit, Call Centre and CPC department responsibilities. Asst. General Manager - Recovery: CAIIB & LLB graduate with relevant specialised banking experience. Senior professionals with proven track record in Recovery, NPA management and legal follow-up. Responsible for performing loss mitigation and recovery activities regarding delinquent or charged-off accounts in accordance with Bank and legal guidelines.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Asst. General Manager / Dy. General Manager - Operations

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NKGSB Bank Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NKGSB Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NKGSB Bank Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application is sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for Branch Managers at NKGSB Bank?
faq.answer: For Branch Managers, candidates must be a Graduate in any discipline. CAIIB/JAIIB qualifications are preferred, along with a minimum of 5 to 7 years of branch banking experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Head IBD position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Head IBD position is 50 years. However, this age limit is relaxable in special cases, as per the bank's policy.

faq.question: Q4. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by emailing their detailed CV to the specified email address. The subject line of the email must clearly mention the post being applied for.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for most of the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for most of the posts is a Graduate degree in any discipline. Specific roles may require additional qualifications like CAIIB, JAIIB, or a degree in Trade Finance.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any specific experience requirements for the recovery roles?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Asst. General Manager - Recovery position, candidates need to be CAIIB & LLB graduates with relevant specialised banking experience, demonstrating a proven track record in recovery and NPA management.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from across India apply for these vacancies?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type is listed as Full Time and the state is mentioned as Across India, indicating that candidates from all over the country are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key responsibilities for the Asst. General Manager / Dy. General Manager - Operations?
faq.answer: This role involves managing customer grievances, ensuring regulatory compliance, and acting as a liaison between the bank, RBI, and customers. It also includes overseeing various departments like Operations, Clearing, and Grievance Redressal.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NKGSB Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
